wins: Closed WS01 through WS12 through bounded owner-repo landings rather than a monolithic backlog replay.
Preserved both critical source boundaries: ~/src/abyss-stack stayed the editable source checkout and ATM10-Agent stayed GitHub-only for WS12.
Extended Dionysus owner-repo reality checks so GitHub raw owner anchors can close the final endcap honestly.
frictions: The full route still depends on heavy owner judgment across many repositories.
The delivery lane crosses approval-sensitive mutation and public-share surfaces.
The mixed local-plus-GitHub path has only one full reviewed closure cycle so far.

extracts.title: GitHub-Only Owner-Endcap With Reality-Canary Sync
extracts.summary: A reusable engineering law for landing a remote-only owner-repo endcap through issue plus PR plus CI plus merge, then rebinding Dionysus reality checks to the landed owner anchors.
notes: The surviving value is owner-truth discipline and post-merge reality sync, not a single executable leaf workflow.

extracts.title: Wave-Gated Federated Remediation Closure Route
extracts.summary: A multi-step scenario for taking a federated remediation pack through planning packets, bounded owner slices, validator-backed merge discipline, and lineage-retained final closeout.
notes: The route spans planning, mutation, validation, GitHub-native closure, and seed-garden follow-through.

automation_candidate.title: Bounded Owner Delivery Lane
automation_candidate.current_manual_route: planning packet -> bounded owner slice -> repo-native validation -> commit/push/PR or GitHub-only PR -> CI repair if needed -> merge -> Dionysus reality sync

deferrals.title: Automation-ready promotion
deferrals.reason: The delivery lane is real enough to scan, but still too approval-sensitive and too lightly repeated across sessions to call seed-ready.

deferrals.title: Diagnosis or repair packet
deferrals.reason: The session closed the pack rather than leaving unresolved repair work as the main surviving object.

deferrals.title: Quest promotion
deferrals.reason: No single repeated reviewed quest-shaped unit remains after donor split.

quest_hooks.reason: Broader donor harvest, automation classification, and route choice still dominate over final promotion triage.
